message:
refactor: push stale filtering to storage layer and use theme system

Stale command optimization:
- Move date filtering to storage layer via updated_before filter
- Add sort and reverse options to list queries for oldest-first ordering
- Remove redundant post-fetch filtering and sorting in stale.rs
- Use theme system (ctx.theme()) instead of hardcoded color parsing

Query command cleanup:
- Simplify execute signature (remove unused json parameter)
- Let query subcommands handle their own output formatting

List command:
- Minor output formatting adjustments

Storage layer:
- Add updated_before filter support
- Improve sort field handling

Tests:
- Add conformance test coverage for new filter behaviors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -269,6 +269,7 @@ fn build_filters(args: &ListArgs) -> Result<ListFilters> {
         assignee: args.assignee.clone(),
         unassigned: args.unassigned,
         include_closed,
+        include_deferred: args.deferred,
         include_templates: false,
         title_contains: args.title_contains.clone(),
         limit: args.limit,
